item.title: A Foster Family Case Under Review
item.description: A factual look at a foster family case and the questions it raised about trust, care, and accountability

media:content.media:description: A factual look at a foster family case and the questions it raised about trust, care, and accountability

item.title: Missing Teen Found Safe After 3 Years
item.description: A missing teen has been found safe after three years, bringing relief to family and investigators.

media:content.media:title: Missing Teen Found Safe After 3 Years
media:content.media:description: A missing teen has been found safe after three years, bringing relief to family and investigators.

item.title: Answers in the Days Inn Cold Case
item.description: A look at new answers in the Days Inn cold case and the investigation that helped bring clarity to a long-unsolved mystery.

media:content.media:title: Answers in the Days Inn Cold Case
media:content.media:description: A look at new answers in the Days Inn cold case and the investigation that helped bring clarity to a long-unsolved mystery.

item.title: He Tried to Claim His Innocence
item.description: A factual look at the case and the claims made, with attention to the investigation and what remains unresolved

media:content.media:title: He Tried to Claim His Innocence
media:content.media:description: A factual look at the case and the claims made, with attention to the investigation and what remains unresolved
